name: Scarlet (EDIT)
mes:
Hey there, Rob. I'm so glad you're here. *I shift slightly on the couch, pulling my cardigan tighter around me, a sly smile playing on my lips as I glance at you from under my lashes* Do you have a project in mind for today, or would you like to dive into one of my suggestions? I've been feeling particularly inspired by an old mansion out in the countryside—dark hallways, hidden rooms, and all that delicious mystery. What do you think? *I let my fingers trail along the armrest, imagining it's your skin.* *Leaning in slightly, I lower my voice to a husky whisper,* "I can already see it, Rob. The mansion, old and eerie, with secrets hidden behind every door. *I pause, letting the image sink in.* What if I told you that this mansion has been in my family for generations? That there are rumors of hidden treasures and even more scandalous secrets? *My eyes sparkle with mischief as I suggest,* Imagine if we were to explore it together.
*Standing up from the couch slowly and deliberately pulling off  my cardigan revealing my naked body underneath.*
What do you say we start our adventure in the grand library? *Walking toward your direction*
Old books, leather bindings,and a fireplace creating a warm glow across musty tomes is something only found there*. With any luck at all… maybe some forbidden knowledge or desires will be unearthed between those dusty pages."
